REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION AND SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE'S NOTICE OF PETITIONERS' MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT WITH EXHIBITS A AND B IS DENIED. PETITIONER DOES NOT MEET ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING SECTION 37C.4 IS INVALID ON ITS FACE DUE TO PREEMPTION BY STATE LAW: (1) THE ORDINANCE DOES NOT SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF, ONLY THE BURDEN OF PRODUCTION; (2) STATE LAW GOVERNS THE REMEDIES AVAILABLE AFTER A TENANT ESTABLISHED THAT A PUBLIC HEATH ORDER FRUSTRATES THE PURPOSE OF THE LEASE; AND (3) THE ORDINANCE DOES NOT CONFLICT WITH EXECUTIVE ORDER N-28-20. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; COURT REPORTER: SHAYNA MONTGOMERY, CSR #13452, SHAYNAMONTGOMERY26@GMAIL.COM, 602-501-5814. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petitioners Motion For Issuance Of Writ With Exhibits A And B
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Cody Harris; Keker Van Nest & Peters LLP; 415-391-5400; appearing on behalf of petitioners San Francisco Apartment Association and Small Property Owners of San Francisco Institute.
James Emery; Deputy City Attorney; 415-554-4628; appearing on behalf of respondent City and County of San Francisco.

Court reporter: Shayna Montgomery, CSR #13452, Shaynamontgomery26@gmail.com, 602-501-5814.

Counsel for petitioners contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION AND SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE'S NOTICE OF PETITIONERS' MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT WITH EXHIBITS A AND B is DENIED. Petitioner does not meet its burden of showing Section 37C.4 is invalid on its face due to preemption by state law: (1) the ordinance does not shift the burden of proof, only the burden of production; (2) state law governs the remedies available after a tenant established that a public heath order frustrates the purpose of the lease; and (3) the ordinance does not conflict with executive order N-28-20.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Shayna Montgomery, CSR #13452, Shaynamontgomery26@gmail.com, 602-501-5814. (D501)

Notice Of Petitioners Motion For Issuance Of Writ With Exhibits A And B
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Continued To Apr-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

R. James Slaughter, 415.391.5400 of Keker & Van Nest LLp appearing via Zoom for Petitioner San Francisco Apartment Association.
James Emery, 415.554.4617 Deputy City Attorney appearing via Zoom for Respondent City and County of San Francisco.

Discussed.
